# Transcrição: 06-How to Add Client Folder to Google Drive

## [00:00 - 00:57]

So the last thing, and this is kind of optional, but I really recommend that you have a Google Drive agency folder and then inside of that you have a folder for your clients. And so once you've mapped out, you can sync. So again, we're using Lucidchart here, but you can use any funnel build software. Lucidchart integrates with Google Drive. So you'll see here we just created this funnel. And what we're going to do is we're actually going to move this into the client folder so that it is there. So it's automatically synced in our drive. And the last step we want to do is we just want to make sure that we're adding our... There we go. Our funnel to that folder so that at any one time inside of the CRM, which would have the Google Drive access, everything relating to that client will be underneath that.
